commit.message:
Visionneuse de documents avec éditeur de texte riche TipTap

- Nouveau composant DocumentViewer : overlay plein écran avec aperçu + éditeur
- Aperçu documents : iframe pour PDF, img pour images
- Éditeur TipTap : gras, italique, souligné, titres, listes, alignement, undo/redo
- Contenu HTML persisté dans DocumentMeta.contenu via le store
- Bouton Eye (visualiser) + clic sur le nom du document ouvre la visionneuse
- Bouton Télécharger actif pour les documents avec fichier stocké

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: v99 — 3 critical pipeline fixes (dedup, labeling, shadow trades)

1. Snapshot dedup 24h → 1h: v95 dedup blocked ALL tokens after first
   cycle (75 tokens × 24h = 100% filtered). Reduced to 1h to allow
   periodic re-snapshotting while still avoiding back-to-back dupes.
   DB unique constraint idx_snapshots_token_cycle is the real guard.

2. Labeling batch: increased DB config batch_limit 2000→4000 and
   time_budget 1800→2400s to clear 12K backlog faster (~1500/run).

3. Shadow trades pnl_usd: was NULL for all shadow trades (pos_usd=0
   → pnl_usd=None). Now uses simulated $10 position so pnl_usd is
   always computed. Backfilled 10,761 existing shadow trades in DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: consolidate dependabot dependency upgrades (#30)

## Summary

Consolidates all open dependabot PRs (#10, #12, #21, #22, #26, #29) into
a single upgrade:

- **frontend**: `react`/`react-dom` 18 → 19,
`@types/react`/`@types/react-dom` 18 → 19, `react-router-dom` 6 → 7
- **server**: `pg-boss` 10 → 12, with required API changes in `queue.ts`
(named import, `createQueue` options, `expireInSeconds` instead of
`expireInMinutes`/`expireInHours`)
- **tests**: `vitest`/`@vitest/ui` 3 → 4

TypeScript compiles cleanly across server and frontend.

Closes #10, #12, #21, #22, #26, #29

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add location selection, scan-to-stock, and per-user last-location tracking

Adds UrlsMixin with three custom API endpoints:
- GET  /api/locations/ — browse stock location tree with breadcrumbs
- POST /api/scan-to-stock/ — scan barcode + create stock at a location
- GET/PUT/DELETE /api/last-location/ — per-user last-used location

Location resolution follows a fallback chain: explicit param > last-used
(per-user, via Django cache) > plugin DEFAULT_LOCATION setting.

New plugin settings: AUTO_ADD_STOCK, DEFAULT_LOCATION, DEFAULT_QUANTITY.
The standard scan() flow now optionally creates a StockItem at the
default location when both AUTO_CREATE_PARTS and AUTO_ADD_STOCK are on.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix PPO place order button: match dynamic text, use CDP click, scroll overlay

The "Place 2 of 2 orders (7 items)" button was not found because:
1. Text matching searched for "place order" substring but actual text has
   "2 of 2" between "place" and "orders" — now uses regex /place.*order/i
2. Scrolled main page instead of overlay — now uses scrollIntoView
3. Used el.click() instead of CDP mouse click for React Native Web

Also improves cart data panel detection with "Order Summary" and
"Estimated Total" text matching, and fixes OrderMailer.order_failed
accepting 2 args when signature only took 1.

commit.message:
fix: replace @react-pdf/renderer with pdfkit for fast PDF downloads

@react-pdf/renderer was hanging (30s+ cold start, often infinite) due to its
React layout engine. Replaced with pdfkit (already a transitive dep, now
promoted to direct). PDF generation now takes <1s. All 4 templates rewritten
with pdfkit's stream API: Modern sidebar, Minimal date-column, Corporate
centered formal, Creative coloured header.

- Reference new deployment guide for easier access

variables and provides comprehensive deployment instructions.

commit.message:
Phase 11: Event Sourcing (Audit Log)

Adds an immutable process_audit_logs table with 25 event types covering
every state transition, command dispatch, and received event. Audit calls
wired into TransitionService (18 points), ManagementService, OutboxPublisher,
StepTimeoutService, TimerService, and WorkerEventListener. Exposes the trail
via GET /api/processes/{id}/audit. 99/99 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: map-reduce gap analysis pipeline for large cases (>50 docs)

Two-phase AI analysis: map phase (gpt-5-mini, per-batch) detects gaps
within document groups, reduce phase (gpt-5.4) merges batch reports
into a unified result. Includes deterministic batching by role_in_case,
overflow splitting for groups >40 docs, tiered retry with JSON repair
prompt and gpt-4.1 fallback, mechanical merge when reduce fails, and
lightweight state hash for >50-doc cases. 65 unit tests covering
batching, dedup, routing, prompt content, error handling, and fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Allow manual dispatch to include dev environment in cron jobs

Add workflow_dispatch input 'include_dev' so dev can be targeted
on-demand while remaining excluded from scheduled runs.

Add state machine for parsing ANSI CSI sequences. Supports cursor
movement (A/B/C/D/H), clear screen (2J), erase to EOL (K), and SGR
foreground colors (30-37). Also handles \r, \t, and backspace (0x08).

to stop receiving webhook notifications (no emails sent after meetings).

- Add 12-hour periodic auto-renewal timer as safety net
- New endpoint: POST /bot/webhooks/lifecycle

commit.message:
Add Cloudflare KV persistence layer for cross-browser data sync

Refactor entire data layer from synchronous localStorage to async
Cloudflare Worker KV + localStorage fallback. Every save writes to
both KV and localStorage; every load tries KV first. Includes
one-time migration function to bulk-copy existing localStorage data
to KV on first sync.

commit.message:
fix(cms): corriger l'onglet Tarifs pour matcher l'API backend plans

L'interface Plan du frontend ne correspondait pas au modèle Prisma :
- prix → prixMensuel/prixAnnuel
- features → planModules (avec modules liés)
- populaire → actif
- ordre → ordreAffichage
- Ajout champs: code, couleur, essaiJours, stripeProductId, etc.

Corrections:
- Interface Plan alignée sur le modèle Prisma réel
- loadPlans corrigé: l'API retourne { data: { plans } } pas { data: Plan[] }
- PlanModal réécrit avec les vrais champs (code, prixMensuel, prixAnnuel, essaiJours, etc.)
- createPlan/updatePlan envoient les champs attendus par l'API Zod schema
- renderPlansTab affiche les infos réelles (prix mensuel/annuel, modules, abonnements)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Biotech Scanner: optimize for catalyst trading opportunities

Three changes to prioritize actionable catalyst trades:

1. Risk Score → Opportunity Score: Sweet spot is $0.5-10B MCap
   (5 pts) instead of favoring Large Caps. Mega Caps like ABBV
   ($400B) now score low because FDA catalysts barely move them.
   Low Float (10-50M shares) gets max score for explosive potential.

2. Catalyst-Volume Confirmation Bonus: When a catalyst is found
   AND RVOL >= 1.5x, score gets +4 to +10 bonus points.
   Smart Money confirming the news = much stronger signal.

3. Float scoring inverted: High Float (>200M) now gets fewer pts
   than Low Float, reflecting catalyst trading dynamics.

Expected: Mid-cap biotechs with real catalysts rank higher than
mega-cap pharma with routine pipeline news.
